title: Create RPG+
description: Create RPG+ merges the detailed machinery of the Create mod with deep RPG progression and challenging combat. It expands your world with stunning biomes, dangerous dungeons, and optimized visuals for an immersive adventure.

```
🎉 NEWS: VERSION 7.1 IS OUT NOW! 🎉

Starting with this update, FTB Quests have been added to the modpack!

Why do you need them?

📖 To learn — quests will explain every mod step by step, from Create's mechanics to Ars Nouveau and Iron's Spells. No more wiki diving — just complete tasks and learn by doing.

🧭 To never lose your goal — quests will guide you on what to do next: build a new machine, clear a dungeon, or master a spell.

🎉 To have more fun — rewards, progression, and that satisfying feeling of moving forward instead of just clicking blocks.

Quests turn Create RPG+ from a sandbox into a real adventure with goals and tutorials.

Be sure to open the quests tab right from the start!

Quests are currently in beta testing
```


---

## Create RPG Plus — Technology, Magic & Adventure in One Pack

Hey everyone! I've put together the perfect modpack for myself — one that blends **Create tech**, **RPG progression**, **magic**, **exploration**, and **stunning visuals**. Everything to make your eyes pop and your fingers itch to play. Meet **Create RPG Plus**!

This pack is assembled with passion: merging Create with dozens of addons, deep skill trees, new monsters, overhauled dungeons, and shaders that turn the game into a painting. If you love not just building, but **pouring your soul into your world**, fighting dangerous bosses, and leveling up your character — this is for you.

---

### ⚙️ Tech & Engineering

At the core is **Create** plus a huge set of addons:
- **Create: Aeronautics** (flyable ships), **Create Crafts & Additions**, **Create Deco**, **Create Diesel Generators**, **Create Enchantment Industry**, **Create Factory Logistics**, **Create Railways Navigator**.
- Build automated farms, food factories, trains, and copy structures with **Create: Pattern Schematics**.
- Also includes **Rechiseled: Create**, **Recipes For Create**, and even **Create: Dragons Plus** — yes, dragons and tech do mix!

### ⚔️ RPG, Combat & Skills

- **Skill trees**: **Default Skill Trees**, **Pufferfish's Skills** + **Attributes**, plus **Stronger Skill tree** — upgrade strength, agility, magic.
- **Magic**: **Ars Nouveau** (with Flavors & Delight addon) and **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks** with Dynamic Skill Tree integration.
- **Combat**: **Mowzie's Mobs** — unique bosses with mechanics. **ParCool!** and **Player Animator** make movement smooth and dynamic.
- More danger: **Artifacts**, **Guard Villagers**, **Corpse**.

### 🌍 World & Exploration

- **World generation**: **Biomes O' Plenty**, **Oh The Biomes We've Gone**, **Terralith** — thousands of unique biomes.
- **Structures**: **YUNG's Better Dungeons**, **Better Mineshafts**, **Strongholds**, **Ocean Monuments**, **Nether Fortresses** and more — fully revamped with puzzles and logic. Also **Underground Village** and **Additional Structures**.
- Navigation: **Xaero's Minimap** + **World Map**, **Ping Wheel**, **BetterF3**.

### ✨ Graphics & Performance

- **Iris** + **Sodium** — perfect FPS.
- **Reese's Sodium Options**, **Better Sodium Video Settings Button**, **Cubes Without Borders**, **Fusion**.
- **Sound Physics Remastered** — realistic audio. **Spawn Animations** — fancy mob appearances.
- Optimization: **EntityCulling**, **Ferrite Core**, **Dynamic FPS**, **Chunky**, **Spark** — runs smoothly even on mid-range PCs.

### 🍳 Cozy Living & Daily Life

- **Farmer's Delight** + **Ender's Delight**, **Expanded Delight**, **More Delight**, **Ocean's Delight**, **My Nether's Delight** — cooking for every taste.
- **Supplementaries** and **Supplementaries Squared** + **Chipped** + **Design n' Decor** — furniture, decoration, blocks for any occasion.
- **Sophisticated Backpacks** and **Storage Drawers** — inventory organization. **Rechiseled** — change block textures.
- **AppleSkin**, **Mouse Tweaks**, **Controlling**, **Inventory Profiles Next**, **Jade**, **Just Enough Items** — convenient interfaces.

### 🎯 Plus many small features

- **Better Third Person**, **Shoulder Surfing Reloaded**, **Cubes Without Borders** — camera like in action games.
- **Simple Voice Chat**, **Chat Heads**, **Villager Names** — communication and lively villages.
- **FancyMenu** **Advancement Plaques**, **Legendary Tooltips**, **Resourcify**, **CustomSkinLoader** — atmosphere and style.

```
### Minimum Requirements

- RAM: 6–8 GB (8+ recommended for shaders)
- Graphics Card: OpenGL 4.5 and Shader Model 4.5 support
- Java: Version 21 or newer
```


---

Honestly, I sit down to play — and lose track of time for hours. Sometimes I'm building complex machinery, other times I'm delving into YUNG's dungeons, or just staring at a sunset in an Oh The Biomes We've Gone biome. If you've been looking for a pack that has **it all** — this is definitely for you!

Drop some feedback if you try it 👍 If you run into any issues, feel free to send your logs to **leha7cool.error@gmail.com** so we can keep improving the pack.

_This pack was tested and put together with passion. Enjoy!_
